title: America’s War, America’s Recession
description: The precise magnitude of the shock the US economy will face as a result of its war of choice in Iran is difficult to predict, given the array of factors at play. But the US is poorly equipped to weather the likely effects on inflation and interest rates, and financial-sector fragility is a key reason why.

Fortunately, through mission-oriented green industrial strategies, governments can help secure living standards and build economic resilience simultaneously.

title: US Institutional Decay Is Threatening Global Finance

title: A Golden Opportunity for a Beleaguered WTO
description: By adopting the Investment Facilitation for Development Agreement, the World Trade Organization would brighten developing economies’ future prospects at a time of rising economic uncertainty.
